_comment: Replace this file with your real evidence corpus before running setup. Each item in `items` becomes a Source on the platform via POST /api/stacks/[id]/items. The orchestrator's preflight requires sourceCount >= 15 before phase 2 (and phase 1 reads them for the EVIDENCE_CORPUS_OVERVIEW prompt section). itemKind must be 'url' or 'doi'; everything else is optional but `title`, `authors`, `publishedAt`, `abstract`, and `tags` materially improve the overview the claim-analyst sees.

items.title: Example: Filter bubbles and political polarization
items.abstract: Replace with a real abstract. Used by the orchestrator to generate the evidence overview the claim-analyst sees.
